channel.title: JS on Hippolyte Vergnol
channel.description: Recent content in JS on Hippolyte Vergnol

item.title: Cuizizine - Recipe blog
item.description: Check out the website Cuizizine, a blog about delicious vegetarian food recipe written using hugo.io.

item.title: Quantum computing - Learning platform
item.description: Check out my learning platform to get familiar with the concepts of Quantum Computing developed using Reveal.js.

item.title: Les Trèfles - Website
item.description: Check out the website of the guest house Les Trèfles, a nice gite near Clermont-Ferrand in the Puy de Dôme (63).

item.title: Agora - Website
item.description: Check out the website of the creperie Agora, a nice restaurant in the medieval city of Laon.
